locations.name: Cherry Street Bar-B-Que
locations.description: Port location with waterfront views. Amazing pulled pork and live music on weekends.
locations.address: 275 Cherry St, Toronto, ON M5A 3L3, CA

locations.name: Beach Hill Smokehouse
locations.description: Beach gem with tangy vinegar based sauces. Great outdoor seating in summer.
locations.address: 172 Main St, Toronto, ON M4E 2W1, CA

locations.name: Barque Smokehouse
locations.description: Roncesvalles spot known for dry rubbed ribs and house made sides. Cozy interior.
locations.address: 299 Roncesvalles Ave, Toronto, ON M6R 2M3, CA

locations.name: The Carbon Bar
locations.description: Downtown spot mixing traditional BBQ with a modern twist. Popular happy hour, and my personal favorite. Frozen options available for pickup&delivery too!
locations.address: 99 Queen St E, Toronto, ON M5C 1S1, CA

locations.name: Holy Smoke BBQ
locations.description: Thornhill joint doing Texas BBQ. Interesting fusion dishes.
locations.address: 8123 Yonge St, Thornhill, ON L3T 2C6, CA

locations.name: B's Sizzling Kitchen
locations.description: Etobicoke. Korean style BBQ with gochujang glazes. Unique take on ribs.
locations.address: 430 Horner Ave, Etobicoke, ON M8W 2B1, CA

locations.name: Breakwall BBQ
locations.description: Hidden gem in the PortLands. Brisket burnt ends are to die for. Casual vibes with a view.
locations.address: 1910 Queen St E, Toronto, ON M4L 1H3, CA

locations.name: Gyu-Kaku Japanese BBQ
locations.description: Interactive tabletop grilling experience. Premium cuts of beef and pork - Very fun for groups!
locations.address: 81 Church St, Toronto, ON M5C 2G2, CA

locations.name: Northern Smokes
locations.description: Scarborough - low and slow smoking with Canadian twist. This place is also halal!
locations.address: 371 Old Kingston Rd #12, Scarborough, ON M1C 1B7, CA

locations.name: BBQ at Bloor
locations.description: Bloor St West - Village spot with authentic Texas style smoking. Big portions and friendly service.
locations.address: 914 Bloor St W, Toronto, ON M6H 1L1, CA
